steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: A government body officially known as the Althing, is a noun phrase serving as the subject. The blank must be filled with an appositive that renames this noun, followed by a predicate verb that completes the sentence.

steps.title: Apply the grammatical rule for appositives
steps.content: Choice A places Iceland's parliament correctly as an appositive, followed by the predicate is one of the oldest in the world. The other choices either join two independent clauses with only a comma (B, C) or use an appositive that contradicts the original noun (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
